title: wolfhsm crate: optional features
description: Implement feature-gated subsystems in wolfhsm. cert.rs (feature=cert): wraps wh_Client_Cert* — init, add_trusted, read_trusted, erase_trusted, verify, verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey, verify_acert. auth.rs (feature=auth): wraps wh_Client_Auth* — set_credentials. she.rs (feature=she): wraps wh_Client_She* SHE automotive key management protocol. All three gated behind Cargo features and #[cfg(feature=...)] in lib.rs.
